canonical_name: Scheme for reimbursement of Testing and Certification Charges for Start-ups and Telecom MSEs
status_basis: Official DoT scheme page and TEC guidelines
status_evidence: DoT specifies reimbursement for eligible telecom/ICT testing and certification; reimbursement percentages are 75% for startups, 60% for micro and 50% for small enterprises.
funding_evidence: Maximum reimbursement for any startup or MSE is capped at INR 50 lakhs for the scheme duration.
objectives: Reimburse eligible telecom/ICT testing and certification charges|Improve startup and MSE competitiveness in domestic and export markets
eligibility: DPIIT-registered startups; MSMEs registered as micro or small with Ministry of MSME; annual revenue not above INR 5 crore and startup funding not above INR 10 crore
benefits: Up to 75% startup, 60% micro-enterprise and 50% small-enterprise reimbursement, subject to the scheme cap
warnings: Application-window status is not stated on the scheme page; do not show Apply until a current window is verified.
recommended_actions: Confirm portal route and quarterly submission window during refresh.

status_basis: Central Sector scheme page published for 2026-27 to 2030-31

benefits: Support for standardisation, innovation, incubation, commercialisation and telecom testbed activities

publication_decision: Check DoT and implementing-agency notices for any applicant-specific calls.
